meaning: n.寒意,寒战,寒心adj.寒冷的,扫兴的v.使冷,变冷,冷藏
examples: A chill stole over her body.
A chill shiver rippled over his skin.
His words sent a chill down her spine.
The couple on board look on, entwined, blankets drawn up to their chests against the evening chill.
